text.title: cloudflare-pages-github Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for cloudflare-pages-github as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using Pages Functions for long-running tasks (PDF rendering, video transcode, multi-step LLM calls) that exceed 30 seconds of CPU time.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pages Functions inherit the Workers CPU/wall-time limits. Long jobs hit the limit, return 524, and waste a billed invocation. Move the work to Workers Queues (`wrangler queues create`) with a producer Function that enqueues a job and returns 202, then a consumer Worker that processes in the background.

failure-mode.description: Storing the same env value as both a plain Variable and a Secret in the dashboard, then editing only the Variable.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pages merges Variables and Secrets at runtime; the Secret wins on collision. After editing only the Variable the deploy continues to use the stale Secret value, producing a silent config drift that is hard to debug. Always store each value in exactly one of the two.
